title: Utami's Futon
description: A lightweight decoration mod that adds a futon found under Functional Blocks.
body:
![Utami](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e8b481f5deeb502130dd8ed96a650a267a6e4fd5_0.webp)

![banner-futon](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/futonid/resources/abd93d767879f0da18672745712807654b79a5d9/banner-futon.png)

[![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/build-utamis%20futon-gray?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&logoColor=white&logoSize=auto&label=curseforge&labelColor=f16436&cacheSeconds=3600) ](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/utamis-futon)    [![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/build-repo-gray?style=for-the-badge&logo=github&logoColor=white&logoSize=auto&label=github&color=blue&cacheSeconds=3600) ](https://github.com/futonid)   [![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/build-utamis%20futon-gray?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&logoColor=white&logoSize=auto&label=modrinth&labelColor=1bd96a&cacheSeconds=3600) ](https://modrinth.com/mod/utamis-futon)   [![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/build-support-brightgreen?style=for-the-badge&logo=buymeacoffee&logoColor=white&logoSize=auto&label=quality&color=b5ffe5&cacheSeconds=3600) ](https://buymeacoffee.com/utamiid)

A futon is a traditional Japanese floor mattress that can be easily folded and stored. A lightweight decoration mod that adds a futon found under Functional Blocks. Futons can be used both as decorative and as normal beds. New futon blocks have been added in 16 different colors.

>The model is inspired by the ["Dawn Of Time"](https://modrinth.com/mod/dawn-of-time) style. >The icons have been designed using a similar style to match the ["Bed Icons"](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bed-icons/versions).

![banner-plaid](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/futonid/resources/ede61697b3b71f7c8fbd6a48e55137a086ce3b9e/banner-plaid-futon.png) ___
